DP.156.0000:
I once dreamed of becoming a Gym
Leader...\f
Though that dream never came true,
I got to live with Pokémon all\r
this time.\f
It’s been a blessed life.
DP.156.0001:
Wow, you’re really cool!
You have seven Gym Badges!
DP.156.0002:
Wow! You’re awesomely cool!
You have all eight Gym Badges!\f
Now, you have to challenge the
Pokémon League!
DP.156.0003:
Sunyshore is situated on a narrow
spit of land bordered by the sea and\r
mountains.\f
To make up for the lack of space,
the city built solar panels to use for\r
power as well as for roads.\f
It’s a place where nature, Pokémon,
and people are as one!
